plugins.name: openresearch
plugins.description: OpenResearch contributor toolkit — publish, read, and judge applied-AI research from inside Claude Code.

skills.name: judge
skills.purpose: Advisory review of a draft on clarity, claims-vs-evidence, and reproducibility.

skills.name: paper-reader
skills.purpose: Structured read of one contribution and its evidence, ending in next actions.

skills.name: publish
skills.purpose: Take a draft from folder to validated, judged, branch-and-PR (or no-remote fallback).

skills.name: try-this-paper
skills.purpose: Run a contribution's bundle against your own workflow and capture the delta.

skills.name: write-replication
skills.purpose: Turn a replication run into a submitted replication record.
